MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th February, 2015 S.O. 432(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Goverrnment, in compliance to the order dated 17th April, 2014 and 24th April, 2014 passed by Hon’ble Supreme Court of India in Civil Appeal No. 461 1 of 2014 [arising out of Special Leave Petition (Civil) No. 19379/2013] in the matter of M/s. Soma Isolux NH One Tollway Private Limited (Appellant) V/s. Harish Kumar Puri and others (Respondents) and as per direction of MORTH vide letter No. H-24036/15/2013-H dated 03.12.2014 and RW H-37011/59/2014-PPP dated 07.01.2015 to shift the toll plaza from km 212.000 to km 211.805, hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) bearing S.O. No. 926(E), dated 6th April,2009, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) namely:–– Notes : 7. For Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Read as Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) (ii) km 212.000 km 211.805 (Near Ghaggar Bridge, Haryana Side) of NH-1 [F. No. NHAI/13013/428/CO/08-09/GC-Ambala (Panipat-Jalandhar) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
